query: SELECT gl.gestorId, g.userName as gestorNome, gl.lojaId, l.nome as lojaNome, l.numeroLoja FROM gestor_lojas gl JOIN gestores g ON g.id = gl.gestorId JOIN lojas l ON l.id = gl.lojaId ORDER BY g.userName, l.nome LIMIT 30
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT gl.gestorId, g.userName as gestorNome, gl.lojaId, l.nome as lojaNome, l.numeroLoja FROM gestor_lojas gl JOIN gestores g ON g.id = gl.gestorId JOIN lojas l ON l.id = gl.lojaId ORDER BY g.userName, l.nome LIMIT 30
